creator: geraud@gcu.info
text: freshports lists web2ldap as the only consumer for this port, that's why I'm PR-ing this update. I have another patch in the works for an update of web2ldap to 1.5.5, but it's waiting for another update ( bug #241873 devel/py-pyasn1 up to 0.4.7 ). I'll have it send by the end of the day.
